questionHtml: Explain how patient recovery from a stroke illustrates the property of neural plasticity.
markschemeHtml:
a. «neural plasticity» is the ability to form new neural connections/synapses ✔

b. the area that is damaged by the stroke had a specific function ✔ 

c. other area of the brain can take on these functions ✔

meta.title: Explain how patient recovery from a stroke illustrates the property of neural plasticity.
